prose.en: Reviews of policies and procedures regarding cryptographic mechanisms include checks that the policies and procedures are up to date and comply with the BSI technical guideline  (BSI TR-02102) or suitable NIST guidelines (e.g. FIPS 140 series and SP 800 series). Deviations are analysed and documented in a risk assessment for cryptographic mechanisms valid at the given time. Remediation measures are to be taken based on risk.
